questionText: Why do you not include greenhouse gas emissions pertaining your business activity(ies) in your direct operations as part of your global gross Scope 1 figure? Describe any plans to do so in the future.
questionKo: 귀사의 직접 운영사업장에서 수행하는 사업 활동 관련 온실가스 배출량을 전 세계 총 Scope 1 배출량에 포함하지 않는 이유와 향후 포함 계획을 설명하십시오.
sectorTags: Agricultural commodities, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry
simpleHelp: This question aims to identify the main reason for why you have not included emissions pertaining to relevant business activities taking place within your organizational boundary, as part of your gross Scope 1 figure. This informs data users on whether your Scope 1 figure is representative of your business' activities and their associated climate-related impacts and indicates if have any plans to do so in the next two years.

options: We are planning to include in the next two years
optionsKo: We are planning to include in the next two years

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "No" in your response to 7.18.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "No" in your response to 7.18.

guidance.text:
General 
You can provide either your primary reason for why you have not included emissions pertaining to your relevant business activities taking place within your organizational boundary as part of your gross Scope 1 figure, or describe any future plans to include these data in the next two years, if applicable.
Primary reason (column 1) 
If none of the reasons are applicable to your organization, select "Other, please specify" and indicate your primary reason. If you need more than 40 characters, please use column 2 (Please explain).
Please explain (column 2) 
Provide an explanation in line with the primary reason selected in column 1.
If you selected the dropdown "Analysis in progress" in column 1, describe your evaluation methods, indicating the procedures and tools used for calculating your figures; specify whether this analysis will cover your entire reporting boundary; and provide a date for when the analysis will be finalized.
If you selected "We are planning to include in the next two years," describe the methods and coverage (e.g., entire reporting boundary, relevant business activity) you plan to use in the analysis.
If you selected "Lack of internal resources," specify the main challenges you experience.
guidance.textKo: 일반 You can provide either your 주된 이유 for why you have not included emissions 관련 to your 관련 business activities taking place within your 조직경계 의 일부로 your gross Scope 1 figure, 또는 설명 하나 이상 향후 계획 to include these data in the next two years, 만약 해당되는 경우. 주된 이유 (열 1) 만약 none 의 reasons are 해당되는 경우 to 귀사, select "Other, 직접 입력" 및 indicate your 주된 이유. 만약 you need more than 40 characters, please use 열 2 (Please explain). Please explain (열 2) Provide an 설명 in line with the 주된 이유 선택 in 열 1. 만약 you 선택 the dropdown "Analysis in progress" in 열 1, 설명 your evaluation methods, indicating the 절차s 및 tools used for calculating your figures; specify whether this analysis will cover your entire 보고경계; 및 provide a date for 경우 the analysis will be finalized. 만약 you 선택 "We are planning to include in the next two years," 설명 the methods 및 coverage (e.g., entire 보고경계, 관련 business activity) you plan to use in the analysis. 만약 you 선택 "부족 internal resources," specify the main challenges you experience.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 표시된 칸(셀)의 개수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
Any of the following options selected in column 'Primary reason' - 1 point
- 'Analysis in progress'
- 'We are planning to include in the next two years'
- 'Other, please specify' (with specification provided)
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 인지 점수를 획득하려면 공시에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. 하나 이상 의 following options 선택 in 열 '주된 이유' - 1 점 - 'Analysis in progress' - 'We are planning to include in the next two years' - 'Other, 직접 입력' (with specification 입력) 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다.
